🌿
What We Do

End-to-End Export,
Handled for You

From sourcing at the farm to delivery at your port — we manage every step so you can focus on your business.

Our Proposition

You Pay. We Deliver.

Zad Global Trade is not just a produce supplier — we are your complete export partner. With direct access to certified farms, established freight forwarding connections and full documentation capability, we remove every friction point between Indian farms and your warehouse. One point of contact. Zero complexity.

How It Works

From Farm to Your Shore

01
🌱

Procurement

We source directly from certified farms with men on the ground at harvest sites across Maharashtra.

02
✅

Quality & Grading

Every batch is inspected, graded and sorted to your specification before packing begins.

03
📦

Packing & Cold Chain

Export-grade packaging with cold chain management to preserve freshness throughout transit.

04
📋

Export Documentation

We handle all export paperwork — phytosanitary certificates, APEDA, customs clearance and more.

05
🚢

Freight & Delivery

Sea or air freight arranged through our established forwarding network, delivered to your destination port.

Our Services

Everything You Need,
Under One Roof

🌾

Farm Procurement

We maintain direct relationships with certified pomegranate and banana farms across Maharashtra. You get farm-fresh produce without dealing with multiple suppliers.

  • Direct farm access — no middlemen
  • Ground-level harvest monitoring
  • Consistent supply across seasons
🔍

Quality Inspection & Grading

Every shipment goes through a rigorous grading process aligned to international import standards. We sort by size, colour, weight and brix levels as required.

  • Pre-shipment quality checks
  • Size and grade sorting
  • Phytosanitary compliance
❄️

Cold Chain & Packaging

Temperature-controlled handling from farm to port. Export-grade corrugated cartons, foam net wrapping and reefer container management for maximum shelf life.

  • Pre-cooling at packing facility
  • Reefer container coordination
  • Custom packaging on request
📋

Export Documentation

We manage the full documentation stack required for fresh produce exports from India — so your shipment clears customs without delays.

  • Phytosanitary & health certificates
  • APEDA registration compliance
  • Commercial invoice, packing list, COO
🚢

Freight Forwarding

Through our established freight forwarding network, we arrange sea and air cargo based on your timeline and budget. We handle the booking — you track the shipment.

  • Sea & air freight options
  • Port to port or door to port
  • Reefer container booking & tracking
🤝

Buyer-Supplier Connections

Need a specific variety or volume that goes beyond our current range? We leverage our ground network across India to connect you with the right verified supplier.

  • Verified supplier introductions
  • Multi-commodity sourcing support
  • Volume consolidation on request
Our Network

Backed by Experience,
Built on Ground Reality

Our operations are supported by an experienced logistics and export network operating out of Pune. We share infrastructure with established exporters who have years of hands-on experience moving perishable cargo across Asia and the Middle East. This means your shipment is handled by people who have done this thousands of times.

We are not a broker. We are operationally involved — from the farm gate to the freight booking — and we stand behind every shipment with our name.

5+ Export Markets
200+ Partner Farms
100% Documented Exports
GAP Certified Supply Chain

What sets our network apart

📍
Men on the Ground Our network has field representatives present at harvest and packing sites — not just office-based coordination.
🔗
Established Freight Connections We work alongside experienced freight operators who move high volumes of perishable cargo regularly across the same lanes you need.
📦
Shared Export Infrastructure Access to established packing, cold storage and documentation infrastructure — without the overhead of setting it up yourself.
🌐
Flexible by Requirement Sea or air, full container or part load — we work with your timeline, volume and budget to find the right solution.
Where We Ship

Currently Serving Asia & the Middle East

Our active export lanes cover key import markets across two of the world's fastest-growing fresh produce regions.

🇦🇪
United Arab Emirates
Middle East
🇸🇦
Saudi Arabia
Middle East
🇲🇾
Malaysia
Southeast Asia
🇧🇩
Bangladesh
South Asia
🇮🇩
Indonesia
Southeast Asia
+ Expanding
New markets on request

Let's Discuss Your Requirements

Tell us your product, volume, destination and timeline — and we will put together a complete export plan for you. No obligation, no complexity.

Get In Touch
Zad Global Trade

Exporting India's premium agricultural heritage to the global stage with integrity, quality, and precision.
